pr-evidence/readme-model-profile-definit.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the diff, ran the focused README governance test, executed the README code fence in a temporary directory, and approved with no findings.
scope: README model profile documentation and project-governance README regression tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py::test_readme_model_profile_example_uses_portable_definition_artifact tests/test_model_profiles.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_model_profiles.py -q; python -m compileall -q src/document_kv_cache src/restaurant_kv_serving; git diff --check; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Updated the README model-expansion example to use a schematic MQA-style KVModelProfile wrapped in a portable ModelProfileDefinition, registered via with_definition, and written as a profile JSON artifact. Added a governance test that parses the README code fence and verifies imported document_kv_cache names are public exports.
pr-evidence/readme-model-profile-definit.why: Future Qwen3.5, MiniMax, and KV Packet-style integrations need a clear model-profile extension path without implying unverified concrete model geometry.
